summary: Gate failed due to pre-existing TypeScript errors. Additionally, a key acceptance criterion was missed: `/apps/dashboard/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx` was not refactored to use the new centralized `getAgentActivity` API call, which was a primary objective of GAP-003.

blockers.symptom: The verification gate failed with exit code 1, caused by pre-existing TypeScript errors reported by `npx tsc --noEmit`.
blockers.resolution: All TypeScript errors must be resolved for the quality gate to pass.

majors.symptom: The acceptance criteria requires `/apps/dashboard/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx` to use the new `getAgentActivity()` function, but the builder report states 'No changes needed' because it uses a sub-component with its own hook. This fails to meet the centralization requirement.
majors.resolution: Refactor `/apps/dashboard/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx` to use the centralized `getAgentActivity()` function directly, removing the old fetch implementation.

next_actions_for_builder: Resolve all pre-existing TypeScript errors to ensure `npx tsc --noEmit` passes.
Refactor `/apps/dashboard/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx` to directly import and use the `getAgentActivity()` function from `/apps/dashboard/src/lib/api.ts`.
evidence: Builder Report: 'Pre-existing TypeScript errors found (not in new code)'
Builder Report: '/apps/dashboard/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx - No changes needed - Uses AgentActivityWidget component which has its own hook'
Acceptance Criteria: '[ ] /apps/dashboard/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx uses `getAgentActivity()` instead of raw fetch'
